info.title: Kumbaya Exchange API
info.description:
REST API for the Kumbaya DEX on MegaETH.

## Overview

This API provides:
- **Swap Quotes** - Get optimal routes and transaction calldata for token swaps
- **Pool Data** - Access liquidity pool information, metrics, and activity
- **Token Data** - Trending tokens, price history, and token details
- **User Positions** - Query liquidity positions by wallet address

## Supported Chains

| Chain | Chain ID | Status |
|-------|----------|--------|
| MegaETH Mainnet | 4326 | Live |
| MegaETH Testnet | 6343 | Live |

## Authentication

Most endpoints are public. Partner endpoints (`POST /api/v1/quote`, `GET /api/v1/quote/tokens`) require an API key via the `x-api-key` header.

## Native ETH

For swaps involving native ETH, use either:
- `0xEeeeeEeeeEeEeeEeEeEeeEEEeeeeEeeeeeeeEEeE`
- `0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000`

## Error Handling

All errors return JSON with an `error` field. Quote endpoints also include a `reason` field with a machine-readable error code for programmatic handling.

ok.description: Whether the service is healthy and ready to accept requests.

HealthResponse.description: Service health check response. Returns `ok: true` when the service is ready.

quote.description: Expected output amount in human-readable decimal format.

quoteGasAdjusted.description: Output amount adjusted for estimated gas costs. May be negative if gas exceeds output.

gasUseEstimate.description: Estimated gas units for the swap transaction.

route.description: Detailed route information showing the path through liquidity pools. Contains protocol, pools, amounts, and gas estimates.

GetQuoteResponse.description:
Response for public quote lookups (GET /api/v1/quote).

Contains the quoted output amount, gas estimates, and transaction calldata ready for execution.

to.description: Universal Router contract address to send the transaction to.

value.description: ETH value to send with the transaction (in wei, as hex string). `0x00` for token swaps, non-zero for native ETH swaps.

calldata.description: Encoded calldata for the Universal Router execute() function.

MethodParameters.description: Transaction parameters ready to be submitted to the blockchain.

error.description: Human-readable error message describing what went wrong.
error.example: No route found for 0x4200...0006 → 0x021e...782B. There may be no liquidity pools for this pair.

details.description: Additional context about the error, such as token addresses or amounts involved.

QuoteError.description:
Error response for quote requests.

All quote errors include:
- `error`: Human-readable message suitable for display or logging
- `reason`: Machine-readable code for programmatic error handling
- `details`: (optional) Context about the error including tokens/amounts involved

QuoteErrorReason.description:
Machine-readable error code for programmatic handling.

**Error Codes:**
- `NO_ROUTE` (404): No route found between the token pair. No liquidity pools exist.
- `INSUFFICIENT_LIQUIDITY` (500): Route exists but not enough liquidity. Try smaller amount.
- `NO_POOLS_AVAILABLE` (500): No pools connect the input and output tokens.
- `ROUTE_MISSING_METHOD_PARAMETERS` (500): Route found but failed to generate calldata.
- `INVALID_TOKEN_ADDRESS` (400): Token address is malformed or invalid.
- `TOKEN_NOT_FOUND` (500): Token address is not a deployed ERC-20 contract.
- `TOKEN_DECIMALS_FETCH_FAILED` (500): Could not read decimals() from token.
- `INVALID_AMOUNT` (400): Amount value is malformed or invalid.
- `AMOUNT_TOO_SMALL` (400): Trade amount below minimum threshold.
- `CHAIN_NOT_CONFIGURED` (400): ChainId valid but not enabled on this server.
- `CHAIN_NOT_SUPPORTED` (400): ChainId is not recognized.
- `RPC_ERROR` (500): Network/RPC error (rate limits, connection issues).
- `QUOTE_TIMEOUT` (500): Request timed out. Network may be congested.
- `ALLOWLIST_VIOLATION` (400): Token not on partner allowlist.
- `ROUTE_BUILD_FAILED` (500): Unexpected error. See error message for details.

fromAmount.description: Input amount in base units (same as request).

toAmount.description: Expected output amount in base units.

toAmountMin.description: Minimum output amount after slippage (in base units). Transaction reverts if output is less.

slippage.description: Applied slippage tolerance as a decimal (e.g., 0.005 = 0.5%).

approveToAddress.description: Address to approve for token spending (Universal Router or Permit2).

gasEstimation.description: Estimated gas units for the transaction.

PartnerQuoteResponse.description:
Quote response with transaction payload for partner and open quote endpoints.

Includes:
- Input/output amounts in base units
- Minimum output with slippage protection
- Ready-to-submit transaction object
- Optional metadata about allowlist enforcement

to.description: Contract address to send the transaction to.

value.description: ETH value in wei (hex). `0x00` for token swaps, non-zero for native ETH swaps.

callData.description: Encoded transaction calldata for the swap.

allowlistApplied.description: Whether token allowlist validation was applied to this quote.

chainId.description: Chain ID for the token list.

TokensResponse.description:
Allowlisted token directory for the requested chain.

Partners can only request quotes for tokens in this list. Use this endpoint to populate token selectors in your UI.

AllowlistedToken.description: Token that is approved for trading via partner endpoints.

pools.description: Array of pool objects matching the query filters.

nextCursor.description: Cursor for fetching the next page of results. Null if no more pages.

PoolsPageResponse.description: Paginated response containing pools and a cursor for the next page.

error.example: Invalid feeTier: must be one of 100, 500, 3000, 10000

PoolsErrorResponse.description: Error response for pool listing endpoints.

UiPoolsErrorResponse.description: Error response for pool UI endpoints.

error.example: User not found or invalid address

indexedBlock.description: Block number the indexer has processed up to

chainBlock.description: Current block number on the chain

blocksBehind.description: Number of blocks the indexer is behind

isSynced.description: True if indexer is within 100 blocks of chain head

status.description: Transaction has been submitted but not yet confirmed.

txHash.description: Transaction hash of the failed transaction.

error.description: Error message explaining why the transaction failed.

txHash.description: Transaction hash of the successful swap.

fromToken.description: Address of the token that was swapped from.

toToken.description: Address of the token that was received.

fromAmount.description: Amount of fromToken that was swapped (in base units).

toAmount.description: Amount of toToken that was received (in base units).

receivedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the swap was confirmed.

SwapStatusResponse.description:
Swap transaction status response.

**Status Values:**
- `pending`: Transaction submitted but awaiting confirmation
- `failed`: Transaction reverted or failed on-chain
- `success`: Transaction confirmed and swap completed

For successful swaps, the response includes token addresses and amounts involved.

error.description: Human-readable error message describing what went wrong.

ErrorResponse.description: Standard error response returned by all endpoints when an error occurs.

tags.name: UI Users

post.description:
Verifies the provided password against the configured site password.

If no site password is configured on the server, always returns `success: true`.

200.description: Password verification result. Check `success` field for outcome.

success.description: Whether the password matched. Returns `true` if no site password is configured.

get.description:
Readiness probe for the exchange API.

Use this endpoint for Kubernetes liveness/readiness probes or load balancer health checks.

200.description: Service is healthy and ready to accept requests.

get.description: Quote builder with full route details. Parameters are provided via the query string.

schema.description: Amount in base units for the quote.

parameters.description: Amount in base units for the quote.
parameters.name: amount

schema.description: Route type. Use exactOut to request an exact output quote.

parameters.description: Route type. Use exactOut to request an exact output quote.
parameters.name: type

schema.description: Slippage in basis points. Defaults to 50 (0.5%).

parameters.description: Slippage in basis points. Defaults to 50 (0.5%).
parameters.name: slippageBps

schema.description: Recipient address for the swap output.

parameters.description: Recipient address for the swap output.
parameters.name: recipient

schema.description:
Router contract to use for swap execution.
- `swap-router-02`: SwapRouter02 with standard ERC20 approvals (default). Simpler for integrators.
- `universal`: UniversalRouter with Permit2 system. Requires Permit2 allowance setup.

parameters.description:
Router contract to use for swap execution.
- `swap-router-02`: SwapRouter02 with standard ERC20 approvals (default). Simpler for integrators.
- `universal`: UniversalRouter with Permit2 system. Requires Permit2 allowance setup.
parameters.name: routerType

schema.description:
When true, UniversalRouter uses tokens already in its balance instead of pulling via Permit2.

Only applicable when routerType is "universal". Ignored for "swap-router-02".

Use this for aggregator integrations where:
1. Aggregator transfers tokens to UniversalRouter first
2. Then calls execute() with this flag enabled
3. Router swaps using its own balance instead of pulling from msg.sender

parameters.description:
When true, UniversalRouter uses tokens already in its balance instead of pulling via Permit2.

Only applicable when routerType is "universal". Ignored for "swap-router-02".

Use this for aggregator integrations where:
1. Aggregator transfers tokens to UniversalRouter first
2. Then calls execute() with this flag enabled
3. Router swaps using its own balance instead of pulling from msg.sender
parameters.name: useRouterBalance

schema.description: Partner API key for restricted quote endpoints.

parameters.description: Partner API key for restricted quote endpoints.
parameters.name: x-api-key

200.description: Quote successfully generated with route and transaction calldata.

404.description: No route found between token pair. Reason: `NO_ROUTE`. No liquidity pools exist for this pair.

example.error: No route found for 0x4200...0006 → 0x021e...782B. There may be no liquidity pools for this pair.

500.description: Server error during quote generation. Reasons: `INSUFFICIENT_LIQUIDITY`, `NO_POOLS_AVAILABLE`, `RPC_ERROR`, `QUOTE_TIMEOUT`, `ROUTE_BUILD_FAILED`.

post.description: Restricted partner-facing quote endpoint that enforces the token allowlist.

Only applicable when routerType is "universal". Ignored for "swap-router-02".

Use this for aggregator integrations where:

example.error: Invalid feeTier: must be one of 100, 500, 3000, 10000
Failed to fetch pools from indexer

get.summary: List admitted pools for a trading pair
get.description: Returns pools that pass the 6-rule admission filter for the given pair, with current on-chain state. Used by the frontend quoter to avoid shipping the Hasura admin secret to the browser.

schema.description: Input token address (used by admission-filter rules 5 & 6)

parameters.description: Input token address (used by admission-filter rules 5 & 6)
parameters.name: tokenIn

schema.description: Output token address (used by admission-filter rules 5 & 6)

parameters.description: Output token address (used by admission-filter rules 5 & 6)
parameters.name: tokenOut

get.description: Search for pools with optional token filters.
Get paginated pool list with TVL, volume, fees, and APR metrics.

schema.description: Search by token symbol or name

parameters.description: Search by token symbol or name
parameters.name: search

get.description: Get detailed pool information including recent swaps, mints, and burns.

schema.description: Bypass backend/indexer cache and refresh live balances for post-transaction updates.

parameters.description: Bypass backend/indexer cache and refresh live balances for post-transaction updates.
parameters.name: bypassCache

get.description: Get historical timeseries data for a pool (TVL, volume, fees over time).
Get pool activity (swaps, mints, burns) with pagination and filtering.

schema.description: Activity type: swaps, mints, burns, all

parameters.description: Activity type: swaps, mints, burns, all
parameters.name: type

get.description: Get initialized tick data for a pool's liquidity distribution.
Get active liquidity positions for a pool. Use for client-side liquidity chart computation.
Get swap history for a pool with cursor or page-based pagination.
Dense, zero-filled signed net USD flow series for a pool. Positive buckets = users buying the launch token, negative = users selling.

schema.description: Whether the launch token is token0 in the pool. Determines buy/sell sign.

parameters.description: Whether the launch token is token0 in the pool. Determines buy/sell sign.
parameters.name: isTokenToken0

schema.description: Bypass the short backend cache for live-update refetches.

parameters.description: Bypass the short backend cache for live-update refetches.
parameters.name: bypassCache

get.description: Get global exchange statistics including TVL, volume, fees, and historical timeseries. Use granularity=hourly for intraday data (up to 168 hours) or granularity=daily for longer periods (up to 90 days).

schema.description: Number of data points to return

parameters.description: Number of data points to return
parameters.name: limit

get.description: Get trending tokens by trading volume. Optionally include Fire protocol activity (launches, buys, sells, fuels) via the `include` parameter.

schema.description: Comma-separated activity types to include: launched,bought,sold,fueled,yapped,earned,shilled,trending. If omitted, only returns tokens (no activity).

parameters.description: Comma-separated activity types to include: launched,bought,sold,fueled,yapped,earned,shilled,trending. If omitted, only returns tokens (no activity).
parameters.name: include

200.description: Trending tokens list with optional activity

get.description: Get curated bluechip token prices and data.
Get USD prices for tokens. Pass optional `addresses` (comma-separated, max 100) to request only those tokens without pagination; otherwise returns paginated tokens with liquidity.

schema.description: Bulk response page number. Ignored when addresses are provided.

parameters.description: Bulk response page number. Ignored when addresses are provided.
parameters.name: page

schema.description: Bulk response page size, max 500. Ignored when addresses are provided.

parameters.description: Bulk response page size, max 500. Ignored when addresses are provided.
parameters.name: limit

schema.description: Comma-separated token addresses (max 100). When provided, only those tokens are returned and pagination is not applied.

parameters.description: Comma-separated token addresses (max 100). When provided, only those tokens are returned and pagination is not applied.
parameters.name: addresses

get.description: Check if a token is a Fire token and get its graduation status. Returns null if the token is not a Fire token.
Get swap history for a token across every pool that contains it.
Get token details including price, volume, and liquidity information.
Get historical price and volume data for a token. Minute granularity is capped to 24 hours of data.

schema.description: Number of days (1-120), used when granularity=day

parameters.description: Number of days (1-120), used when granularity=day
parameters.name: days

schema.description: Number of hours (1-720), used when granularity=hour

parameters.description: Number of hours (1-720), used when granularity=hour
parameters.name: hours

schema.description: Number of minutes (1-1440), used when granularity=minute. Max 24 hours of minute data.

parameters.description: Number of minutes (1-1440), used when granularity=minute. Max 24 hours of minute data.
parameters.name: minutes

schema.description: Snap the trailing candle close to the live router price

parameters.description: Snap the trailing candle close to the live router price
parameters.name: snapToLive

schema.description: Render the full requested window instead of trimming to where the token has data

parameters.description: Render the full requested window instead of trimming to where the token has data
parameters.name: fillWindow

get.description: Get the latest ETH-denominated token price point as `{ time, value }`.
Get active (non-zero liquidity) positions for a user address.
Get the current sync status of the blockchain indexer. Returns block heights for both the indexer and chain, along with sync progress.
Returns swap execution status for the provided transaction hash. Possible statuses: `pending`, `success`, `failed`.

schema.description: Ethereum transaction hash (66 characters starting with 0x).

parameters.description: Ethereum transaction hash (66 characters starting with 0x).
parameters.name: txHash

200.description: Transaction status. Returns `pending` if not yet confirmed, `success` with swap details if completed, or `failed` with error message if reverted.

400.description: Invalid chain ID or malformed transaction hash.

500.description: Failed to fetch transaction status from blockchain.
